data.name: XA0010_Adb
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: adb {0} - further detailed error message

data.name: XA0010_AdbTarget
data.value: Invalid adb target name '{0}'. Target names must start with `-d`, `-e`, or `-s`.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: adb, `-d`, `-e`, `-s` {0} - the target name the user supplied

data.name: XA0010_NoAbi
data.value: Could not retrieve the Android ABI for the attached device or emulator `{0}`. Please reconnect the device or restart the emulator, and try again.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: ABI ABI - is an acronym for Application Binary Interface. {0} - the target name the user supplied

data.name: XA0126_UnableToCopyFastDevTools
data.value: Unable to copy Fast Deployment tools to '{0}/{1}' on the target device. This device might not be compatible with Fast Deployment. Please set the 'EmbedAssembliesIntoApk' MSBuild property to 'true' to disable Fast Deployment in the Visual Studio project property pages, or edit the project file in a text editor.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: {0} - A device path {1} - A filename

data.name: XA0127_ErrorDeployingFile
data.value: Error deploying '{0}' using '{1}: {2}'. Please set the 'EmbedAssembliesIntoApk' MSBuild property to 'true' to disable Fast Deployment in the Visual Studio project property pages, or edit the project file in a text editor.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: {0} - A filename {1} - The tool that was used to deploy the file. {2} - The actual error that occured.

data.name: XA0128_RedirectStdioIsEnabled
data.value: The 'log.redirect-stdio' Android system property is set to 'true' on the target device or emulator. To enable compatibility with Fast Deployment, set the property to 'false' or reboot the device or emulator to clear the value.

data.name: XA0129_ErrorDeployingFile
data.value: Error deploying '{0}'. Please set the 'EmbedAssembliesIntoApk' MSBuild property to 'true' to disable Fast Deployment in the Visual Studio project property pages, or edit the project file in a text editor.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: {0} - A filename

data.name: XA0130_FastDevNotSupported
data.value: Sorry. Fast Deployment is only supported on devices running Android 5.0 (API level 21) or higher. Please set the 'EmbedAssembliesIntoApk' MSBuild property to 'true' to disable Fast Deployment in the Visual Studio project property pages, or edit the project file in a text editor.

data.name: XA0131_DeveloperModeNotEnabled
data.value: The 'run-as' tool has been disabled on this device. Either enable it by activating the developer options on the device or by setting `ro.boot.disable_runas` to `false`.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: 'run-as' - a native android tool 'ro.boot.disable_runas' - the android property which disables the `run-as` tool.

data.name: XA0132_PackageNotInstalled
data.value: The package was not installed. Please check you do not have it installed under any other user. If the package does show up on the device, try manually uninstalling it then try again. You should be able to uninstall the app via the Settings app on the device.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated:

data.name: XA0133_RunAsPermissionDenied
data.value: The 'run-as' tool required by the Fast Deployment system has been disabled on this device by the manufacturer. Please disable Fast Deployment in the Visual Studio project property pages or edit the project file in a text editor and set the 'EmbedAssembliesIntoApk' MSBuild property to 'true'.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: 'run-as' - a native android tool

data.name: XA0134_RunAsPackageNotDebuggable
data.value: The application does not have the 'android:debuggable' attribute set in the AndroidManifest.xml. This is required in order for Fast Deployment to work. This is normally enabled by default by the .NET for Android build system for Debug builds. Please check that you to not have this attribute set on the 'application' element in your 'AndroidManifest.xml'. If you have a class that derives from 'Android.App.Application' and are using the '[Application]' make sure the 'Debuggable' property is not set at all as it will override the value for debug builds.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: AndroidManifest.xml - A xml file application - A xml element within a xml file. Application - A code attribute. Debuggable - A code property android:debuggable - An attribute in a xml file.

data.name: XA0135_RunAsPackageNotAndApplication
data.value: The package is a 'system' application. These are applications which install under the 'system' user on a device. These types of applications cannot use 'run-as'. The Fast Deployment system should have handled this particular error automatically and used a backup installation path. However if you are seeing this error please file an issue with the exact error message using the 'Help->Send Feedback->Report a Problem' menu item in Visual Studio or 'Help->Report a Problem' in Visual Studio for Mac. If possible attach a full diagnostic build log to the feedback report as this will help us diagnose the issue.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated:

data.name: XA0136_RunAsCorruptInstallation
data.value: The 'run-as' command failed with '{0}'. The currently installation of the package in corrupt. Please manually uninstall the package from all the users on device and try again. If that does not work you can disable Fast Deployment. Fast Deployment can be disabled in the Visual Studio project property pages or edit the project file in a text editor and set the 'EmbedAssembliesIntoApk' MSBuild property to 'true'.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: 'run-as' - a native android tool {0} - The error message raised by the program.

data.name: XA0137_RunAsOSCorrupt
data.value: The 'run-as' command failed with '{0}'. Fast Deployment is not currently supported on this device. Please file an issue with the exact error message using the 'Help->Send Feedback->Report a Problem' menu item in Visual Studio or 'Help->Report a Problem' in Visual Studio for Mac. Please set the 'EmbedAssembliesIntoApk' MSBuild property to 'true' to disable Fast Deployment in the Visual Studio project property pages, or edit the project file in a text editor.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: 'run-as' - a native android tool {0} - The error message raised by the program.

data.name: XA0138_ErrorReadingStdin
data.value: Error deploying '{0}' using '{1}: {2}'. This is usually due to an error in `adb` when the file data is sent over to the device. The normal cause for this is a loose or low quality USB cable. Please try a different cable. Alternatively try using Wifi Debugging, this can be more reliable than USB debugging for certain devices. If all of that fails please set the 'EmbedAssembliesIntoApk' MSBuild property to 'true' to disable Fast Deployment in the Visual Studio project property pages, or edit the project file in a text editor.
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: {0} - A filename {1} - The tool that was used to deploy the file. {2} - The actual error that occured.

data.name: StartDebugger_ipAddress_port
data.comment: The following are literal names and should not be translated: {0} - An ip address of a computer. {1} - An interger value describing the port to use.
